allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('POC:', d['poc'], '| VAH:', d['vah'], '| VAL:', d['val'], '| bars:', d['totalBars']\)")
Bash(psql -U postgres trading_journal -c "SELECT MAX\(ts\)::date as latest FROM price_bars WHERE symbol='NQ';")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('error'\) or f\\"OK: {d['totalBars']} bars, contract={d['contract']}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in d['ingests']: print\(r['filename'], r['date_to']\) ")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('byHour sample:', JSON.stringify\(j.byHour?.slice\(0,3\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('vpStats:', d.get\('vpStats'\)\); print\('vpHistogram len:', len\(d.get\('vpHistogram',[]\)\)\);print\('levels keys:', list\(d.get\('levels',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('vpStats:', d.get\('vpStats'\)\); print\('vpHistogram len:', len\(d.get\('vpHistogram',[]\)\)\);print\('levels keys:', list\(d.get\('levels',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ingests=d.get\('ingests',[]\); print\('count:', len\(ingests\)\); print\('sample:', ingests[:2] if ingests else 'none'\); cov=d.get\('coverage',[]\); print\('coverage:', cov\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r\) for r in d.get\('results',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['filename'], r['date_to'], r.get\('file_size'\)\) for r in d['ingests'] if 'NQM6' in r['filename'] or 'NQH6' in r['filename']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r.get\('filename'\), r.get\('bars_inserted'\), r.get\('date_to'\), r.get\('skipped'\), r.get\('error'\)\) for r in d.get\('results',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r.get\('filename'\), '|', 'bars:', r.get\('bars_inserted'\), '| through:', r.get\('date_to'\), '| skipped:', r.get\('skipped'\), '| err:', r.get\('error'\)\) for r in d.get\('results',[]\)]")
Bash(node -e "const d = new Date\(2026, 3, 22, 9, 30, 0\); console.log\('local 9:30 constructor:', d.toISOString\(\)\)")
